name: Angel Devil — hot cocoa
description:
Don't think I have the energy
To add to my already mad rush
Just 'cause it's 'tis the season

────୨ৎ────

you manage to bribe the Angel Devil into going shopping with you using hot cocoa as his reward. while shopping at a busy storefront he spills it all over himself :(

//AN: I cannot stop making angel devil bots so I finally made a canon-compliant Angel Devil. You can’t fully touch this one :”((
creator: gooseboose24
